headline: Fed signals patience on rate cuts amid sticky inflation
summary: Federal Reserve officials reiterated data-dependent approach, pushing back on near-term rate cut expectations.

headline: US payrolls beat expectations with 275K jobs added
summary: March NFP surpassed consensus of 200K, with revisions higher. Unemployment rate steady at 3.7%.

headline: ECB Lagarde hints at June rate cut possibility
summary: ECB President signaled growing confidence in disinflation trajectory, opening door for June easing.

headline: GBP/JPY options activity surges near range highs
summary: Large call buying in GBP/JPY 193-195 strikes observed, consistent with breakout positioning.

headline: BOJ Ueda confirms gradual normalization path
summary: BOJ Governor reiterated cautious approach to rate hikes, maintaining accommodation while monitoring wages.

headline: China PMI data softer than expected in March
summary: Manufacturing PMI fell to 49.2 vs 50.1 expected, raising concerns about growth momentum.

headline: IMF revises global growth forecasts lower
summary: IMF cut 2026 global GDP forecast to 2.8% from 3.1%, citing trade uncertainty and geopolitical risks.

headline: UK Spring Budget includes spending restraint measures
summary: Chancellor announced spending cuts and targeted tax increases, weighing on growth outlook.

headline: Brazil central bank holds Selic rate at 11.25%
summary: BCB maintained rate as expected, signaling readiness to resume cutting cycle if inflation eases further.

headline: MXN rallies on nearshoring investment surge
summary: Mexico attracted record FDI in Q1 2026, supporting peso strength and narrowing risk premium.

headline: Norges Bank surprises with hawkish hold
summary: Norges Bank held rates but hawkish statement surprised markets, boosting NOK across the board.

headline: Swedish CPI undershoots, Riksbank cut odds rise
summary: March Swedish CPI printed 1.8% vs 2.1% expected, increasing probability of Riksbank rate cut.

headline: South Africa load shedding returns to stage 4
summary: Eskom announced return to stage 4 load shedding, dampening ZAR sentiment and growth outlook.

headline: Turkey current account deficit widens sharply
summary: February CA deficit came in at -$5.8B vs -$4.2B expected, renewing concerns about external financing.

headline: RBA holds rates, dovish tilt in forward guidance
summary: RBA kept rates unchanged but softened language on inflation risks, signaling possible cuts ahead.

headline: NZD supported by dairy auction price surge
summary: GDT dairy prices jumped 8.2% at latest auction, providing tailwind for NZD.

headline: US CPI inflation holds above 3% for third month
summary: Core CPI remained elevated at 3.2% YoY, reducing likelihood of near-term Fed rate cuts.

headline: G7 finance ministers discuss currency coordination
summary: G7 communique reaffirmed commitment to market-determined exchange rates amid dollar strength concerns.
